title: PRISMA-Compliant Methodological Protocol for Non-Clinical Systematic, Scoping, Meta-Analysis and Structured Review Studies
author: Ketney, Otto
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This record describes a general, PRISMA 2020–compliant methodological protocol for conducting non-clinical systematic reviews, scoping reviews, meta-analysis, and structured narrative reviews. 
 The protocol defines standardized procedures for eligibility criteria, literature search, independent dual-reviewer screening, data extraction, quality assessment, and evidence synthesis. It is intended as a reusable methodological backbone and may be cited across multiple manuscripts, with context-specific adaptations reported transparently. 
 The protocol involves secondary analysis of published literature only and does not include human participants or clinical interventions. PROSPERO registration is therefore not applicable.
steps_raw:
This record describes a general, PRISMA 2020–compliant methodological protocol for conducting non-clinical systematic reviews, scoping reviews, meta-analysis, and structured narrative reviews. 
 The protocol defines standardized procedures for eligibility criteria, literature search, independent dual-reviewer screening, data extraction, quality assessment, and evidence synthesis. It is intended as a reusable methodological backbone and may be cited across multiple manuscripts, with context-specific adaptations reported transparently. 
 The protocol involves secondary analysis of published literature only and does not include human participants or clinical interventions. PROSPERO registration is therefore not applicable.
